title: Induction of non-selective bulk autophagy
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"3t86","text":"This protocol describes how to induce bulk (non-selective) autophagy in HeLa cells through nutrient starvation.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
materials_text: {"blocks":[{"key":"6pqni","text":"Reagents","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":8}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"b87r3","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"ce44m","text":"Hank balanced salt medium (HBSS, Thermo Fisher).","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"8cai7","text":"Pierce™ Detergent Compatible Bradford Assay KitThermo FisherCatalog #23246","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"c42gc","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"dm2hf","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"74hur","text":"RIPA buffer","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":11}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"es771","text":" ","type":"atomic","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[{"key":0,"offset":0,"length":1}],"data":{}},{"key":"5a5i4","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{"0":{"type":"tables","mutability":"IMMUTABLE","data":{"cellsMeta":{},"colTitles":["",""],"colWidths":["288",100],"data":[["Tris-HCl pH 8.0","50 mM"],["NaCl","150 mM"],["sodium deoxycholate","0.50%"],["SDS","0.10%"],["NP-40","1%"],["cOmplete mini-EDTA protease inhibitor",""],["Roche Phosstop",""]],"guid":"BE7B43501FCD11EEAB069FFBA05647A4","isJexcelDataFormat":true,"legend":"","mergeCells":{},"printData":[["Tris-HCl pH 8.0","50 mM"],["NaCl","150 mM"],["sodium deoxycholate","0.50%"],["SDS","0.10%"],["NP-40","1%"],["cOmplete mini-EDTA protease inhibitor",""],["Roche Phosstop",""]],"rowHeights":[23,23,23,23,23,23,23]}}}}
steps: To induce bulk autophagy, starve the cells by culturing them in Hank balanced salt medium(HBSS, Thermo Fisher) for the indicated time.
Collect cells by trypsinization, wash them in PBS and lyse them in RIPA buffer for 00:20:00 on ice. Clear the samples by centrifugation at 20000 x g, 4 °C, 10 minutes .
Analyse protein samples by SDS-PAGE and western blot analysis.
Collect the soluble supernatant fraction and measure the protein concentrations using the Pierce Detergent Compatible Bradford Assay Kit (23246, Thermo Fisher).
creator: Elias Adriaenssens
